title: This particular scream
wikitext:
[]: This particular scream...             Quote Post by InvaderRen » Sun Jan 13, 2008 2:33 am http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=UQ-4myiJIQg&NR=1 Theres a clip of EVA-01 screaming at 1:15. could someone tell me what EP and what audio track its from? [i heard that the screams are different on the eng and jpn versions] Im planning something and dont really want to use the tinny robotic one from the first episode Thanks

[]:             Quote Post by yokuchi » Sun Jan 13, 2008 1:03 pm It sounds like it's probably from the first time Yui-sama went berzerk [jpn track]

[]:             Quote Post by BEsERk EVA01 » Sun Jan 13, 2008 8:16 pm I've read some of the comments there and most of them point to the scream from Eva 01 when she goes berserk, ingesting the S2 Organ. You can also tell that because of the scene when it screams; pulling its head back with white teeth, and white teeth on Eva 01 was only shown in Episode 19+, when she goes berserk, eating the Angel.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Tue Jan 15, 2008 3:23 pm The Yui-sama scream is probably from Episode 19 when she acquires the S2 Engine. Shinji shown screaming right after that seems to be from Episode 19, too, or from the Episode 24' battle. (Don't remember that sorta scream in EoE.) (Either way, who cares! Ogata Megumi= ) Also: The Death OST having the whole 38 minutes of Dies Irae [REQUIEM] is just insane.

[]:             Quote Post by Incisivis » Tue Jan 15, 2008 8:42 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: (Either way, who cares! Ogata Megumi= )

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Tue Jan 15, 2008 8:44 pm I dunno, but I've heard this too, if that helps any. ;

[]:             Quote Post by TheAyanamiOtaku » Wed Jan 16, 2008 3:32 am I also heard that she does the vocals for PenPen as well. Wow...if she did Sho's screaming then...how would she do Sho's screaming?

[]:             Quote Post by BEsERk EVA01 » Wed Jan 16, 2008 6:20 am Easy. All she needs in a low-pitched voice, and make her yell low, and deep, and groaning/moaning as well. It is almost far off from Sho's screams, but they use computers to digitize the voice so it can sound more frightening and what not.

[]:             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Wed Jan 16, 2008 8:58 am All you need to do is get her to scream or breathe or grunt in a normal voice and then lengthen it. Drawing it out prolongs it and lowers the pitch. Add other pitch alterations and distortions and you get appropriate Eva noises.

[]:             Quote Post by Incisivis » Thu Jan 17, 2008 12:29 pm UrsusArctos wrote: All you need to do is get her to scream or breathe or grunt in a normal voice and then lengthen it. Drawing it out prolongs it and lowers the pitch. Add other pitch alterations and distortions and you get appropriate Eva noises.
